'''''Observateur''''' was a [[Broadside-class cruiser kdb-1|''Broadside''-class cruiser]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
''Observateur'' is [[Wikipedia:French language|French]] for "observer" or "observant." It is also the name of multiple French-language newspapers and magazines, and was the name of at least one French naval vessel.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}

}}
